content:
## Transfer Profile
Standard ACH transfer is the Northstar Bank transfer option for customers who can use the standard delivery window and do not need an expedited product. Its internal transfer type is ach_standard. Quote the customer-facing name as Standard ACH transfer.

| Attribute | Term |
|---|---|
| Fee | 0 |
| Per-transfer cap | 25000 |
| Cutoff time | 20:00 |
| Delivery window | 2 business days |
| Counts toward external daily limit | True |

## Quoting Rules
Tell the customer that a Standard ACH transfer submitted by the cutoff uses the listed business-day delivery window. If the request is after the cutoff, apply the next eligible processing window under the bank's cutoff policy rather than promising the same delivery date. See "Transfer Cutoff And Delivery Policy" for cutoff handling and "Transfer Types Fees And Limits Guide" when comparing this option against other transfer products.

## Limit Handling
Use the per-transfer cap when determining whether a single Standard ACH transfer can be submitted. Because this transfer counts toward the external daily limit, also consider the customer's remaining daily external-transfer capacity before confirming availability. Do not split a transfer, waive the fee term, or change the delivery window unless another documented transfer type applies.
title: Standard ACH Transfer Terms
